append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.title: Append Empty A4 Page to PDF
append-empty-a4-page-to-pdf.description: Shows how to load an existing PDF, add a blank page, set its size to A4, and save the updated document.

insert-blank-page-at-index.title: Insert Blank Page at Specific Index in PDF
insert-blank-page-at-index.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, insert a blank page at position 3, and save the modified document.

insert-page-matching-size-from-page-2.title: Insert New Page Matching Size of Page 2
insert-page-matching-size-from-page-2.description: Loads a PDF, reads the width and height of the second page, inserts an empty page at position five, and sets the new page's size to match the second page.

add-multiple-empty-pages-sequentially.title: Add Multiple Empty Pages Sequentially
add-multiple-empty-pages-sequentially.description: Demonstrates how to add a series of empty pages to a PDF document by iterating over a list of page counts, while respecting Aspose.Pdf evaluation mode limits.

read-pdf-page-dimensions.title: Read PDF Page Dimensions
read-pdf-page-dimensions.description: Loads a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf, iterates through each page, and logs the width and height of every page to the console.

resize-seventh-pdf-page-to-letter-size.title: Resize Seventh PDF Page to Letter Size
resize-seventh-pdf-page-to-letter-size.description: Shows how to open a PDF, ensure it has at least seven pages, and change the size of the seventh page to Letter format using Aspose.Pdf's SetPageSize method.

resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.title: Resize All PDF Pages to A5
resize-all-pdf-pages-to-a5.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, resize each page to A5 dimensions, and save the modified document.

rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Fourth Page of PDF by 90 Degrees
rotate-fourth-page-90-degrees.description: Loads a PDF, verifies it has at least four pages, rotates the fourth page 90° clockwise using the Rotate property, and saves the modified document.

convert-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.title: Convert Odd Pages from Landscape to Portrait
convert-odd-pages-landscape-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, iterates over odd‑numbered pages and swaps the MediaBox dimensions when a page is in landscape orientation, effectively converting those pages to portrait before saving the document.

move-page-9-to-first-position.title: Move Page 9 to First Position in PDF
move-page-9-to-first-position.description: Shows how to reposition page 9 to the beginning of a PDF by inserting it at a new index and deleting the original occurrence using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.title: Reorder PDF Pages Using Custom Sequence
reorder-pdf-pages-custom-sequence.description: Shows how to reorder the pages of a PDF by providing a custom integer array and saving the reordered document.

delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Last Three Pages from PDF
delete-last-three-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, remove the last three pages using PageCollection.Delete, and save the modified document.

delete-range-of-pdf-pages.title: Delete a Range of PDF Pages
delete-range-of-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to remove pages 5 through 10 from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf's Delete method with a page number array.

insert-custom-sized-page-at-beginning.title: Insert Custom-Sized Page at Beginning of PDF
insert-custom-sized-page-at-beginning.description: Demonstrates how to insert an empty page with specific dimensions (200 × 300 points) at the start of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

append-page-to-pdf.title: Append a Page from One PDF to Another
append-page-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load two PDF documents, copy the first page from a source PDF, and append it to the end of a target PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

duplicate-pdf-page-insert-after.title: Duplicate PDF Page and Insert After Original
duplicate-pdf-page-insert-after.description: Shows how to duplicate the third page of a PDF document and insert the copy immediately after the original using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.title: Rotate All PDF Pages 180 Degrees
rotate-all-pdf-pages-180-degrees.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, rotate each page by 180°, and save the modified document.

convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.title: Convert PDF Pages from Portrait to Landscape
convert-pdf-pages-portrait-to-landscape.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through each page, swaps the MediaBox width and height to change the orientation to landscape, and saves the modified document.

insert-blank-pages-double-pdf-page-count.title: Insert Blank Pages to Double PDF Page Count
insert-blank-pages-double-pdf-page-count.description: Demonstrates how to insert a blank page after each existing page in a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, effectively doubling the total number of pages.

rotate-even-pages-pdf.title: Rotate Even Pages of a PDF
rotate-even-pages-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and set a 90‑degree rotation on even‑numbered pages while leaving odd pages unchanged, then save the result.

export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.title: Export PDF Page Dimensions to CSV
export-pdf-page-dimensions-to-csv.description: Shows how to read each page's width and height from a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and write the results to a CSV file for external analysis.

insert-external-pdf-page-at-index.title: Insert External PDF Page at Specific Index
insert-external-pdf-page-at-index.description: Demonstrates how to insert a page from another PDF into a target document at position 2 while preserving the original page size and rotation.

resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.title: Resize First PDF Page to Custom Dimensions
resize-first-pdf-page-custom-dimensions.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, change the size of the first page to 500 × 700 points, and save the modified document.

rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.title: Rotate PDF Pages in Reverse Order
rotate-pdf-pages-reverse-order.description: Demonstrates how to rotate each page of a PDF 90 degrees clockwise, processing pages from the last to the first using Aspose.Pdf.

move-pages-3-6-to-end.title: Move Pages 3‑6 to End of PDF
move-pages-3-6-to-end.description: Shows how to reorder a PDF by moving pages 3 through 6 to the end of the document using Aspose.Pdf for .NET.

copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.title: Copy MediaBox from Page 8 to Page 12
copy-mediabox-page-8-to-12.description: Demonstrates how to retrieve the MediaBox rectangle from one PDF page and apply it to another page using Aspose.Pdf, ensuring both pages share the same dimensions.

insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.title: Insert Ten Empty Pages at PDF Midpoint
insert-ten-empty-pages-at-pdf-midpoint.description: Demonstrates how to calculate the middle of a PDF document and batch‑insert ten blank pages using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.title: Resize Wide PDF Pages to A4
resize-wide-pdf-pages-to-a4.description: Loads a PDF, iterates through its pages, and resizes any page wider than 600 points to standard A4 dimensions while leaving narrower pages unchanged.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf.description: Shows how to read a list of page numbers from a text configuration file and remove those pages from a PDF document with Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-descending.title: Reorder PDF Pages in Descending Order
reorder-pdf-pages-descending.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, reorder its pages in descending numeric order, and save the reordered document.

convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.title: Convert PDF Pages to Portrait Orientation
convert-pdf-pages-to-portrait.description: Loads a PDF, examines each page's MediaBox, and changes landscape pages to portrait by swapping width and height, then saves the modified document.

rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.title: Rotate Every Third PDF Page by 90 Degrees
rotate-every-third-pdf-page-90-degrees.description: Shows how to open a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, rotate pages whose number is divisible by three by 90 degrees, and save the modified document.

delete-first-page-from-pdf.title: Delete First Page from PDF
delete-first-page-from-pdf.description: Shows how to remove the first page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf and save the modified file.

resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Uniform Size
resize-pdf-pages-uniform-size.description: Shows how to determine the largest page dimensions in a PDF and resize all pages to that size using Aspose.Pdf.

reset-pdf-page-rotation.title: Reset PDF Page Rotation to Original Orientation
reset-pdf-page-rotation.description: Shows how to load a PDF, read a page's current rotation, reset it to the default (no rotation), and save the updated document.

extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.title: Extract, Resize to A4, and Reinsert PDF Pages
extract-resize-reinsert-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to extract a range of pages from a PDF, change their size to A4, and insert them back at a specified position using Aspose.Pdf.

move-even-pages-to-end.title: Move Even Pages to End of PDF
move-even-pages-to-end.description: Demonstrates how to reorder a PDF by extracting all even‑numbered pages, removing them from their original positions, and appending them to the end while preserving their order.

resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-match-template-size.description: Shows how to load a template PDF, read its first page dimensions, and apply those dimensions to all pages of another PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.title: Rotate PDF Pages by Configurable Angles
rotate-pdf-pages-by-configurable-angles.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying page‑specific rotations defined in a dictionary, and saving the modified document.

insert-transparent-separator-page.title: Insert Transparent Separator Page into PDF
insert-transparent-separator-page.description: Demonstrates how to add an empty PDF page with a transparent background as a separator between existing pages using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-last-page-from-pdfs.title: Delete Last Page from PDFs in a Folder
delete-last-page-from-pdfs.description: Shows how to loop through PDF files in a directory, remove the last page of each document, and save the modified files using Aspose.Pdf.

move-page-between-pdfs-preserving-rotati.title: Move a Page Between PDFs Preserving Rotation and Size
move-page-between-pdfs-preserving-rotati.description: Demonstrates how to transfer a single page from one PDF to another using Aspose.Pdf while keeping the original page size and rotation.

adjust-media-box-to-crop-pdf-page.title: Adjust MediaBox to Crop PDF Page
adjust-media-box-to-crop-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to modify a page's MediaBox to define a custom cropping region without altering the page content, using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-fixed-width.title: Resize PDF Pages to Fixed Width
resize-pdf-pages-to-fixed-width.description: Shows how to batch resize all pages in a PDF to a fixed width of 800 points while preserving the original aspect ratio using Aspose.Pdf.

delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.title: Delete Specific Pages from PDF Using Aspose.Pdf
delete-specific-pages-from-pdf__v2.description: Demonstrates how to read a list of page numbers from a text file, validate them, and delete those pages from a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.title: Reorder PDF Pages by Orientation (Landscape then Portrait)
reorder-pdf-pages-by-orientation.description: Loads a PDF, separates its pages into landscape and portrait groups, then creates a new PDF with all landscape pages followed by all portrait pages.

add-blank-front-matter-page-with-label-i.title: Add Blank Front-Matter Page with Custom Label "i"
add-blank-front-matter-page-with-label-i.description: The example loads an existing PDF, inserts a blank page at the beginning, assigns a custom page label with the prefix “i” for front‑matter numbering, and saves the modified document.

resize-pdf-pages-to-printable-area.title: Resize PDF Pages to Printable Area
resize-pdf-pages-to-printable-area.description: Demonstrates how to scale each page of a PDF so that its content fits within a printable area of 595 × 842 points using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-empty-page-custom-size.title: Insert Empty Page with Custom Size into PDF
insert-empty-page-custom-size.description: Shows how to add a blank page of user‑defined dimensions at a specific position in an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.title: Resize PDF Pages to Match a Template Size
resize-pdf-pages-to-template-size.description: Demonstrates how to load a reference PDF, extract its page dimensions, and resize every page of another PDF to those dimensions using Aspose.Pdf.

add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.title: Add Text Header to First PDF Page
add-text-header-to-first-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates how to add a header with custom top margin to the first page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's HeaderFooter and MarginInfo classes.

add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.title: Add HTML Header with CSS to First Three PDF Pages
add-html-header-to-first-three-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert an HTML fragment styled with CSS as a header on the first three pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Scaled Image Footer to Each PDF Page
add-scaled-image-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a footer image, scaled to a fixed height, at the bottom of every page in a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-footer-30-opacity.title: Add Image Footer with 30% Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-footer-30-opacity.description: Shows how to add an image footer with 30% opacity to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Generation Date Footer to PDF Pages
add-generation-date-footer-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert a text footer with the current generation date on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Diagonal Text Watermark to PDF Pages
add-diagonal-text-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent diagonal text watermark on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Rotated Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-rotated-image-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to apply a PNG image as a watermark on each page of a PDF, scaling it to half the page size, centering it, rotating it 45°, and adjusting opacity using Aspose.Pdf.

add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.title: Add Image Watermark with Opacity to PDF Pages
add-image-watermark-with-opacity-to-pdf-.description: Shows how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and apply an ImageStamp with 20% opacity as a watermark before saving the document.

add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.title: Add Repeating Image Watermark to PDF Pages
add-repeating-image-watermark-to-pdf-pag.description: Demonstrates how to overlay a semi‑transparent image watermark repeatedly in a grid across each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-dynamic-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Dynamic Year Watermark to PDF Pages
add-dynamic-year-watermark-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, creating a TextStamp that includes the current year, applying it to every page, and saving the watermarked document.

add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.title: Add Semi-Transparent Text Watermark with Outline to PDF Pages
add-semi-transparent-text-watermark.description: Shows how to place a semi‑transparent text watermark with an outline on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.title: Add LightGray Background to All PDF Pages
add-lightgray-background-to-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through each page, set a LightGray background color for branding, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-transparent.title: Set PDF Page Background to Transparent
set-pdf-page-background-transparent.description: Demonstrates how to make each page of a PDF have a fully transparent background using Aspose.Pdf, useful for overlay documents.

set-pdf-page-background-color.title: Set PDF Page Background Color with RGB
set-pdf-page-background-color.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, define an RGB brand color, apply it as the background for each page (and optionally the whole document), and save the modified file.

set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using CMYK Values
set-pdf-page-background-cmyk.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, create a CMYK color, apply it as the background for each page, and save the modified document.

set-pdf-page-background-hsl.title: Set PDF Page Background Color Using HSL Values
set-pdf-page-background-hsl.description: Demonstrates converting HSL color values to an Aspose.Pdf.Color and applying it as the background of a PDF page.

set-pdf-page-background-from-theme.title: Set PDF Page Background Color from Theme Configuration
set-pdf-page-background-from-theme.description: Shows how to read a theme value from a JSON file and apply the corresponding background color to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

set-alternating-page-background-colors.title: Set Alternating Page Background Colors in PDF
set-alternating-page-background-colors.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and assign LightGray or White background colors alternately before saving the document.

add-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Centered Page Numbers to PDF
add-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Shows how to insert a page number stamp that starts at 1 and is centered on every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-roman-page-numbers.title: Insert Roman Numeral Page Numbers into PDF
insert-roman-page-numbers.description: Shows how to add Roman numeral page numbers to the introductory pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-chapter-page-numbers-into-pdf.title: Insert Chapter‑Prefixed Page Numbers into PDF
insert-chapter-page-numbers-into-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and add a PageNumberStamp with a custom "Chapter #" format at the bottom‑center of each page.

add-page-numbers-leading-zeros.title: Add Page Numbers with Leading Zeros to PDF
add-page-numbers-leading-zeros.description: Shows how to insert sequential page numbers padded with a leading zero on each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-custom-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Custom Page Numbers to PDF
add-custom-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, create a PageNumberStamp with a custom "Page X of Y" format, apply it to every page, and save the updated document using Aspose.Pdf.

insert-custom-page-numbers-pdf.title: Insert Custom Page Numbers with Separator in PDF
insert-custom-page-numbers-pdf.description: Shows how to add page numbers in the "current/total" format to every page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumber and TextStamp classes.

add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.title: Add Superscript Page Numbers to PDF Pages
add-superscript-page-numbers-to-pdf.description: Creates a PDF and adds a page‑number stamp to each page, formatted as superscript (smaller font size and raised baseline) positioned at the bottom‑right corner.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-font.title: Add Page Numbers with Custom Font to PDF
add-page-numbers-with-custom-font.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers on every PDF page using a custom Arial 14‑point font with Aspose.Pdf.

add-page-numbers-with-custom-embedded-fo.title: Add Page Numbers with Custom Embedded Font
add-page-numbers-with-custom-embedded-fo.description: Demonstrates how to insert page numbers on each PDF page using a TrueType font loaded from an external file and ensure the font is embedded in the output PDF.

add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Odd PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-odd-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, loop through its pages, and apply a page number stamp only on odd-numbered pages before saving the document.

add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.title: Add Page Numbers to Even PDF Pages
add-page-numbers-to-even-pdf-pages.description: Shows how to insert page numbers only on even pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf's PageNumberStamp.

insert-page-numbers-after-toc.title: Insert Page Numbers After Table of Contents Using Bookmarks
insert-page-numbers-after-toc.description: Shows how to locate the Table of Contents page via bookmark detection and add page numbers to all following pages in a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert Bates numbering stamps starting at 1000 with a dash suffix on all pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.title: Add Bates Numbering with Custom Prefix and Suffix to PDF
add-bates-numbering-with-custom-prefix-s.description: Demonstrates how to apply Bates numbering to each page of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf, with a custom prefix "DOC" and suffix "-2026".

add-alphanumeric-bates-numbering-to-pdf.title: Add Alphanumeric Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-alphanumeric-bates-numbering-to-pdf.description: Shows how to apply Bates numbering with a custom alphanumeric prefix to every page of a PDF document using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.title: Add Bates Numbering to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-to-pdf.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, applying year‑based Bates numbering in the format "2026-####" to every page, and saving the modified document.

add-bates-numbering-increment-5.title: Add Bates Numbering with Increment of 5 to PDF Pages
add-bates-numbering-increment-5.description: Shows how to batch‑process PDF files, adding a Bates numbering artifact to each page with a step of 5 and saving the modified documents.

replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.title: Replace Bates Numbering in PDF
replace-bates-numbering-in-pdf.description: Demonstrates how to delete any existing Bates numbering artifacts from all pages of a PDF and then add a new Bates numbering sequence using Aspose.Pdf.

remove-specific-bates-numbering-stamp.title: Remove Specific Bates Numbering Stamp from PDF Pages
remove-specific-bates-numbering-stamp.description: Demonstrates how to locate and delete Bates numbering artifacts with a given prefix on selected pages of a PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

replace-pdf-headers-and-footers.title: Replace PDF Headers and Footers
replace-pdf-headers-and-footers.description: Shows how to remove any existing header and footer from each page of a PDF and then add a new header and footer using Aspose.Pdf.

read-pdf-page-count.title: Read PDF Page Count with Aspose.Pdf
read-pdf-page-count.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF using Aspose.Pdf and retrieve the total number of pages without saving the document.

read-page-dimensions-from-pdf.title: Read Page Dimensions from PDF
read-page-dimensions-from-pdf.description: Shows how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, iterate through its pages, and obtain the width and height of each page.

adjust-pdf-bleedbox-margins.title: Adjust PDF BleedBox Margins for Printer Specifications
adjust-pdf-bleedbox-margins.description: Loads a PDF, expands each page's BleedBox (or MediaBox as fallback) by a fixed margin and saves the modified document.

retrieve-trimbox-values-from-pdf-pages.title: Retrieve TrimBox Values from PDF Pages
retrieve-trimbox-values-from-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates loading a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, optionally setting a CropBox, and reading the TrimBox coordinates of each page to verify the content area.

crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.title: Crop PDF Pages to Remove Margins
crop-pdf-pages-remove-margins.description: Shows how to set each page's CropBox using rectangle coordinates to trim uniform margins from a PDF with Aspose.Pdf.

extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.title: Extend BleedBox Beyond CropBox in PDF
extend-bleedbox-beyond-cropbox.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF with Aspose.Pdf, read each page's CropBox, expand it by 5 points on all sides, and assign the resulting rectangle to the page's BleedBox before saving.

trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.title: Trim White Space Around PDF Pages Using Content Bounding Box
trim-white-space-around-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to automatically trim the white margins of each page in a PDF by calculating the content bounding box and setting the page's TrimBox accordingly.

trim-white-space-pixel-tolerance.title: Trim White Space and Remove Blank Pages with Pixel Tolerance
trim-white-space-pixel-tolerance.description: Demonstrates how to detect and delete blank PDF pages using a custom pixel‑based tolerance, and optionally adjust the TrimBox to remove surrounding white space.

crop-pdf-pages-to-4by3-aspect-ratio.title: Crop PDF Pages to 4:3 Aspect Ratio
crop-pdf-pages-to-4by3-aspect-ratio.description: Shows how to iterate through a PDF, calculate a 4:3 crop region for each page, and apply it using the CropBox property with Aspose.Pdf.

add-header-with-logo-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Header with Logo Image to PDF Pages
add-header-with-logo-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to insert a left‑aligned header containing a logo image on every page of an existing PDF using Aspose.Pdf.

add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.title: Add Bold Uppercase Header to PDF Pages
add-bold-uppercase-header-to-pdf-pages.description: Demonstrates how to load a PDF, iterate through its pages, and add a centered bold uppercase header to each page using Aspose.Pdf.

add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-page.title: Add Curved Text Watermark to PDF Page
add-curved-text-watermark-to-pdf-page.description: Demonstrates opening a PDF, creating a WatermarkArtifact with styled text, positioning it at the page centre, applying a rotation to simulate a curved path, and saving the modified document.
